sample.author: Tyler Davis
sample.title: Georgia family questions man’s 14-year involuntary committal with no trial
sample.rationale: Deeply distressing story of 14-year confinement without trial gives strongly negative valence; reporting is largely fact-based but sympathetic framing toward family and due-process failures tilts tone mildly critical.

sample.author: The Associated Press
sample.title: Georgia officials knew chemicals from carpet mills were polluting local water. The people did not.
sample.rationale: Grim subject of toxic contamination and illness drives strongly negative valence; investigative framing emphasizes regulatory failure and industry deference, tilting tone somewhat critical despite included official responses.

sample.author: Mary Landers
sample.title: FAQ: After boil water advisory,  how much do you know about your water?
sample.rationale: Mostly an educational FAQ about regional water sources following a resolved boil-water advisory; neutral informative framing with no editorial slant.

sample.author: Robin Kemp
sample.title: Finding financial footing for Walthourville: One mayor’s journey
sample.rationale: A town's serious financial struggles end with hard-won solvency; framing clearly champions Mayor Hayes as a heroic, ethical public servant against petty rivals.

sample.author: Margaret Coker
sample.title: Daughter’s battle for father’s care sparks scrutiny on Georgia War Veterans Home
sample.rationale: Grim account of alleged neglect at a veterans' home drives strongly negative valence; reporting is largely fact-based with official responses, though investigative framing leans mildly critical.

sample.author: Robin Kemp
sample.title: Fort Stewart soldiers honored for bravery in subduing shooter
sample.rationale: Recovery and heroism recognition lend positive valence over a grim shooting backdrop; reporting is straight, fact-based with balanced quotes and security questions, so tone is neutral.

sample.author: Maya Homan/Georgia Recorder
sample.title: Voter guide: Democratic candidates for Georgia Secretary of State
sample.rationale: A neutral, informational candidate guide presenting Democratic contenders' bios and answers in their own words; framing is balanced civic-information, mildly positive as election participation content.

sample.author: Maya Homan/Georgia Recorder
sample.title: Lawmakers weigh seismic changes to Georgia’s voting equipment
sample.rationale: Balanced policy reporting on contentious voting-system change debate, presenting multiple perspectives objectively; slightly negative valence from controversy, distrust, and cost concerns, but neutral tone.

sample.author: Craig Nelson, Caitlin Philippo
sample.title: Kingston campaign gets Trump nod amid questions about ties to father, district
sample.rationale: Investigative profile amasses skeptical facts about Kingston's thin résumé, residency and no degree; framing leans pointedly critical despite some supporter quotes, yielding negative valence and mildly negative tone.

sample.author: Domonique King
sample.title: One year later: How the Liberty County schools’ phone ban is working
sample.rationale: Reports a well-intentioned policy largely failing in its first year, with enforcement breakdowns and parent conflict, but written in balanced fashion presenting multiple perspectives and some positives.

sample.author: Robin Kemp
sample.title: Liberty County Development Authority considers alternate wastewater discharge site
sample.rationale: Contentious development-versus-environment conflict carries mildly negative valence, but balanced reporting presenting residents, officials, and experts keeps tone neutral.

sample.author: The Current
sample.title: Standout stories: The Current’s picks for 2025
sample.rationale: Staff celebrate their favorite 2025 stories—covering both grim topics and triumphs—with proud, self-promotional framing yielding a mildly positive takeaway and clearly favorable tone toward the outlet's own work.

sample.author: The Associated Press
sample.title: CNN founder and philanthropist Ted Turner dead at 87
sample.rationale: A death is negative valence but the obituary largely celebrates a storied life of achievement; tone is mostly balanced with mildly admiring framing while noting controversies.

sample.author: Jonathan Shorman/Stateline
sample.title: Trump’s DOJ offers states confidential deal to remove voters flagged by feds
sample.rationale: Subject matter is troubling (privacy risks, federal overreach in elections), giving negative valence; reporting is largely balanced with both sides quoted, though critic voices slightly dominate, nudging tone marginally negative.

sample.author: Margaret Coker
sample.title: Telfair Museums seeks new leader after year of ‘self-inflicted’ wounds
sample.rationale: Subject matter is clearly negative—staff exodus, layoffs, leadership turnover, declining attendance—but the reporting is balanced, presenting board optimism alongside critical former-staff voices.

sample.author: Robin Kemp
sample.title: Midway City Council approves $3.7 million budget for FY 2026
sample.rationale: Routine municipal budget reporting with detailed line items; neutral factual framing, though notes like the rushed 15-second hearing and prior audit failures add slight unease but no editorial slant.

sample.author: Maya Homan/Georgia Recorder
sample.title: Proposal would require citizenship checks for Georgia families to access food aid
sample.rationale: Subject involves new barriers to food aid criticized by advocates (negative valence); reporting is largely balanced but devotes more space and emphasis to critics, slightly tilting tone.

sample.author: Craig Nelson
sample.title: Attempts to settle CAT dispute flounder
sample.rationale: Subject is an embarrassing, costly governance dispute with failed resolution attempts (negative valence), but reporting is factual, attributed, and balanced (neutral tone).

sample.author: Dave Williams/Capitol Beat
sample.title: House committee assesses economic impact of proposed casinos
sample.rationale: Balanced coverage of a legislative hearing presenting both pro-casino economic arguments and opponents' social-cost concerns, with neutral framing throughout.

sample.author: The Current
sample.title: Public and private relief available to Georgia wildfire victims
sample.rationale: Subject matter is positive—aid availability for wildfire victims—but underlying disaster tempers it; writing is factual and informational, simply relaying program details and deadlines.
